        (function () {
            var toggle    = document.getElementById('nav-toggle');
            var mobileNav = document.getElementById('mobile-nav');
            if (!toggle || !mobileNav) return;

            function openNav() {
                toggle.classList.add('is-open');
                mobileNav.classList.add('is-open');
                toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
                mobileNav.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            }
            function closeNav() {
                toggle.classList.remove('is-open');
                mobileNav.classList.remove('is-open');
                toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                mobileNav.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                document.body.style.overflow = '';
            }

            toggle.addEventListener('click', function () {
                mobileNav.classList.contains('is-open') ? closeNav() : openNav();
            });

            function toggleAccordion(item) {
                var sub  = item.querySelector('.mobile-nav-sub');
                var btn  = item.querySelector('.mobile-nav-toggle');
                var open = !sub.classList.contains('is-open');
                sub.classList.toggle('is-open', open);
                if (btn) btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
            }

            mobileNav.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-toggle').forEach(function (btn) {
                btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                    toggleAccordion(this.closest('.mobile-nav-item'));
                });
            });

            mobileNav.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(function (a) {
                // Accordion parent links toggle their sub — never close the whole menu
                if (a.classList.contains('mobile-nav-link') && a.closest('.mobile-nav-item.has-children')) {
                    a.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        toggleAccordion(this.closest('.mobile-nav-item'));
                    });
                } else {
                    a.addEventListener('click', closeNav);
                }
            });

                    <p class="wp-block-paragraph">In today’s digital-first world, your website isn’t just a platform—it’s your brand’s voice, your portfolio, and your business card all rolled into one. Selecting the right web design agency is critical to ensure your brand stands out online. One of the most effective ways to evaluate an agency is by reviewing their portfolio. A well-curated portfolio reveals the agency’s design style, technical expertise, and ability to craft experiences that resonate with users.</p>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">In this guide, we’ll explore some of the <strong>best web design agency portfolio examples</strong>, what makes them exceptional, and how you can leverage these insights for your own website.</p>
<h2 id="1-why-agency-portfolios-matter" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>1. Why Agency Portfolios Matter</strong></h2>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">When searching for a web design agency, portfolios are your window into their world. They show:</p>
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Design expertise:</strong> Layouts, color schemes, typography choices, and visual storytelling.</li>
<li><strong>User experience proficiency:</strong> Navigation flow, responsive design, and accessibility considerations.</li>
<li><strong>Industry versatility:</strong> Experience across eCommerce, SaaS, creative, and corporate websites.</li>
<li><strong>Technical skills:</strong> Implementation of animations, interactions, and CMS capabilities.</li>
</ul>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">A strong portfolio speaks volumes, often more than any marketing copy.</p>
<h2 id="2-key-features-of-an-exceptional-web-design-portfolio" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>2. Key Features of an Exceptional Web Design Portfolio</strong></h2>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Not all portfolios are created equal. Here’s what to look for:</p>
<ol class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Case studies with results:</strong> Include metrics such as increased traffic, improved conversions, or engagement growth.</li>
<li><strong>Clear presentation:</strong> High-quality images, videos, or live links to websites.</li>
<li><strong>User-centric design approach:</strong> Highlight research, personas, and user testing.</li>
<li><strong>Brand diversity:</strong> Show a range of industries and styles.</li>
<li><strong>Process transparency:</strong> Outline the steps from research to final delivery.</li>
</ol>

</style><h2 id="3-top-web-design-agency-portfolio-examples" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>3. Top Web Design Agency Portfolio Examples</strong></h2>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Here’s a curated list of <strong>web design agencies with outstanding portfolios</strong> that set industry benchmarks:</p>
<h3 id="3-1-huge-inc" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>3.1. Huge Inc.</strong></h3>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Known for their large-scale projects, Huge Inc.’s portfolio reflects creativity fused with data-driven design. Their case studies often include measurable results like engagement rates and conversion metrics.</p>
<h3 id="3-2-fantasy-interactive" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>3.2. Fantasy Interactive</strong></h3>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Fantasy Interactive focuses on immersive, futuristic designs that push boundaries. Their portfolio emphasizes storytelling and interactive experiences.</p>
<h3 id="3-3-r-ga" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>3.3. R/GA</strong></h3>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">R/GA combines innovation with technology in their portfolio, showing a mix of digital campaigns, apps, and websites with strategic design thinking.</p>
<h3 id="3-4-active-theory" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>3.4. Active Theory</strong></h3>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Active Theory is renowned for immersive web experiences and animation-heavy projects, perfect for brands looking for standout visuals.</p>
<h3 id="3-5-b-reel" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>3.5. B-Reel</strong></h3>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">B-Reel’s portfolio demonstrates a mix of creativity, playful interaction, and technical sophistication. Their projects often blur the lines between art and functionality.</p>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><em>(You can continue listing up to 10–15 agencies based on research or your preferred industry examples.)</em></p>
<h2 id="4-how-to-analyze-a-web-design-portfolio" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>4. How to Analyze a Web Design Portfolio</strong></h2>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">When exploring an agency portfolio, consider these criteria:</p>
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Visual appeal:</strong> Is the design aesthetically pleasing and aligned with modern trends?</li>
<li><strong>Functionality:</strong> Are interactive elements intuitive and smooth?</li>
<li><strong>Mobile responsiveness:</strong> Does the site look perfect on all devices?</li>
<li><strong>Consistency:</strong> Are branding and design elements consistent across all pages?</li>
<li><strong>Innovation:</strong> Does the agency introduce unique design solutions or copy industry-standard trends?</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="5-benefits-of-choosing-agencies-with-strong-portfolios" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>5. Benefits of Choosing Agencies With Strong Portfolios</strong></h2>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Selecting an agency with a compelling portfolio offers multiple advantages:</p>
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Confidence in their skills</strong> – You see firsthand what they can deliver.</li>
<li><strong>Inspiration for your own project</strong> – Understand current trends and innovative solutions.</li>
<li><strong>Reduced risk</strong> – Agencies with proven results tend to execute better.</li>
<li><strong>Faster decision-making</strong> – You can quickly shortlist agencies that align with your vision.</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="6-tips-for-creating-a-winning-portfolio-as-an-agency" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>6. Tips for Creating a Winning Portfolio as an Agency</strong></h2>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">For agencies looking to attract clients, a strong portfolio is a must. Key tips:</p>
<ol class="wp-block-list">
<li>Showcase <strong>diverse projects</strong> to highlight versatility.</li>
<li>Include <strong>before-and-after comparisons</strong> to demonstrate impact.</li>
<li>Add <strong>client testimonials</strong> to enhance credibility.</li>
<li>Share your <strong>design process</strong> to show professionalism.</li>
<li>Update your portfolio regularly to reflect new skills and trends.</li>
</ol>
<h2 id="7-the-future-of-web-design-portfolios" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>7. The Future of Web Design Portfolios</strong></h2>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Portfolios are evolving beyond static images. Modern portfolios now include:</p>
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Interactive case studies</strong> – Users can click through live project features.</li>
<li><strong>Video walkthroughs</strong> – Explain design thinking and workflow visually.</li>
<li><strong>Augmented reality previews</strong> – Especially for eCommerce or spatial design projects.</li>
<li><strong>Personalized experiences</strong> – Adaptive portfolios that cater to potential client industries.</li>
</ul>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Agencies embracing these trends often stand out in a crowded market.</p>
<h2 id="conclusion" class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Conclusion</strong></h2>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Your website is more than just a digital presence; it’s a reflection of your brand identity. Reviewing <strong>best web design agency portfolio examples</strong> can inspire your next project, help you understand the latest trends, and ensure you choose an agency capable of delivering both beauty and performance.</p>
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">When selecting an agency, focus on <strong>creativity, technical skills, and measurable results</strong>. By studying top portfolios, you can confidently make decisions that elevate your brand online.</p>
